title: License Plate Page — Content

fields.label: Badge Text
fields.name: lp_hero_badge_text
fields.instructions: Short eyebrow label shown above the heading (e.g. "Limited Edition").

fields.label: Hero Title
fields.name: lp_hero_title
fields.instructions: Main heading for the hero section.
fields.default_value: Support Tennessee With Your Tennessee License Plate

fields.label: Lead Paragraph
fields.name: lp_hero_lead
fields.instructions: Supporting paragraph displayed beneath the heading.
fields.default_value: Show your commitment to youth mental health across the Volunteer State. The Youth Mental Health Matters specialty plate raises awareness and support for mental health resources right here in Tennessee.

fields.label: Price Label
fields.name: lp_hero_price_label
fields.instructions: Short label displayed before the price amount (e.g. "Pre-Order for").

fields.label: Price Amount
fields.name: lp_hero_price_amount
fields.instructions: The pre-order price displayed prominently (e.g. "$36.77"). Include the currency symbol.

fields.label: License Plate Image
fields.name: lp_hero_plate_image
fields.instructions: Photo of the license plate shown in the hero section. Recommended: 1200×600 px, WebP format.

fields.label: Badge Text
fields.name: lp_progress_badge_text
fields.instructions: Short eyebrow label for the progress section (e.g. "Campaign").

fields.label: Section Title
fields.name: lp_progress_title
fields.instructions: Heading for the campaign progress section.

fields.label: Subtitle
fields.name: lp_progress_subtitle
fields.instructions: Supporting paragraph below the section heading.
fields.default_value: We need 1,000 pre-orders to bring this plate to life. Here’s where we stand — every order matters.

fields.label: Current Pre-Orders
fields.name: lp_progress_current
fields.instructions: The current number of pre-orders received. Update this regularly.

fields.label: Goal (Pre-Orders Needed)
fields.name: lp_progress_goal
fields.instructions: The total number of pre-orders required to print the plate (e.g. 1000).

fields.label: Disclaimer Note
fields.name: lp_progress_note
fields.instructions: Small caption shown below the progress bar (e.g. "Numbers are updated regularly. Pre-orders are non-binding until the goal is reached.").
fields.default_value: Numbers are updated regularly. Pre-orders are non-binding until the goal is reached.

fields.label: Badge Text
fields.name: lp_how_badge_text
fields.instructions: Short eyebrow label for the How It Works section (e.g. "Simple Process").

fields.label: Section Title
fields.name: lp_how_title
fields.instructions: Heading for the How It Works section.

fields.label: Subtitle
fields.name: lp_how_subtitle
fields.instructions: Supporting paragraph below the section heading.
fields.default_value: Three easy steps stand between you and a plate that makes a statement.

fields.label: Steps
fields.name: lp_how_steps
fields.instructions: Add each step in the pre-order process. These are rendered as a numbered list.

sub_fields.label: Step Description
sub_fields.name: step_desc
sub_fields.instructions: One or two sentences explaining this step.

fields.label: Badge Text
fields.name: lp_form_badge_text
fields.instructions: Short eyebrow label above the form section heading (e.g. "Pre-Order").

fields.label: Section Title
fields.name: lp_form_title
fields.instructions: Heading for the pre-order form section.

fields.label: Section Subtitle
fields.name: lp_form_subtitle
fields.instructions: Supporting paragraph below the section heading.
fields.default_value: Please complete all fields. You’ll be redirected to PayPal to submit your $36.77 pre-order.

fields.label: Form Card Heading
fields.name: lp_form_card_heading
fields.instructions: Heading displayed inside the form card (e.g. "Pre-order Form").

fields.label: Form Card Note
fields.name: lp_form_card_note
fields.instructions: Short note shown below the form card heading (e.g. "All fields are required. After submission, you will be redirected to PayPal to complete your $36.77 pre-order.").
fields.default_value: All fields are required. After submission, you will be redirected to PayPal to complete your $36.77 pre-order.

fields.label: Submit Button Label
fields.name: lp_form_submit_label
fields.instructions: Text for the form submit button (e.g. "Submit and Pay $36.77").

fields.label: Badge Text
fields.name: lp_cta_badge_text
fields.instructions: Short eyebrow label for the CTA section (e.g. "Get Involved").

fields.label: CTA Title
fields.name: lp_cta_title
fields.instructions: Main heading for the bottom call-to-action section.

fields.label: CTA Subtitle
fields.name: lp_cta_subtitle
fields.instructions: Supporting paragraph below the CTA heading.
fields.default_value: The license plate is just one way to show your support. Learn more about how PC4S is building healthier communities across Rutherford County and Middle Tennessee.

fields.label: Primary Button
fields.name: lp_cta_primary_link
fields.instructions: Primary CTA button (solid style).

fields.label: Secondary Button
fields.name: lp_cta_outline_link
fields.instructions: Secondary CTA button (outline style).

description: Controls all editable content for the Tennessee License Plate pre-order page — hero, campaign progress, how it works steps, form section labels, and CTA.
